title: Warm Crumbly Ukrainian Mushroom Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful Ukrainian dish featuring a variety of mushrooms in a rich dashi broth, served with a side of crumbly beurre-monte topping, perfect for a solo dinner

ingredients.name: mixed mushrooms
ingredients.notes: such as cremini, shiitake, and oyster mushrooms

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, saute the sliced onion and minced garlic over medium heat until softened.
Add the mixed mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
In a small saucepan, warm the dashi broth over low heat.
In a separate bowl, mix the toasted buckwheat groats with the softened beurre-monte until crumbly.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of the cooked mushroom mixture into a heated dolsot stone bowl.
Ladle the warm dashi broth over the mushrooms, then top with the crumbly beurre-monte mixture.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
